title: pelargonium zonale var. marginatum
intro: Pelargonium zonale var. marginatum, also known as the scented geranium or rose-scented geranium, is a fragrant and flowering plant species within the family Geraniaceae. This plant is valued for its leaves, which possess medicinal properties, particularly in the form of essential oils that have been traditionally used to treat various health issues. The leaves of Pelargonium zonale var. marginatum have been shown to exhibit antimicrobial and anti-inflammatory properties, which contribute to its health benefits, such as soothing digestive issues, alleviating stress, and providing relief from menstrual cramps. The plant's leaves can be used in herbal preparations, including teas, infusions, and essential oil extracts, which have been employed in traditional medicine for centuries.
